scripts.typegen: sanity schema extract --studio sanity.config.ts --output schema.json && sanity typegen generate --studio sanity.config.ts && cp sanity.types.ts ../types/sanity/schema.d.ts
scripts.start: sanity schema extract --studio sanity.config.ts --output schema.json && sanity typegen generate --watch --studio sanity.config.ts && cp sanity.types.ts ../types/sanity/schema.d.ts & sanity start
scripts.dev: sanity schema extract --studio sanity.config.ts --output schema.json && sanity typegen generate --watch --studio sanity.config.ts && cp sanity.types.ts ../types/sanity/schema.d.ts & sanity dev
scripts.build: sanity schema extract --studio sanity.config.ts --output schema.json && sanity typegen generate --studio sanity.config.ts && cp sanity.types.ts ../types/sanity/schema.d.ts && sanity build
scripts.deploy: sanity schema extract --studio sanity.config.ts --output schema.json && sanity typegen generate --studio sanity.config.ts && cp sanity.types.ts ../types/sanity/schema.d.ts && sanity deploy
scripts.deploy-graphql: sanity schema extract --studio sanity.config.ts --output schema.json && sanity typegen generate --studio sanity.config.ts && cp sanity.types.ts ../types/sanity/schema.d.ts && sanity graphql deploy
